name: LIPOMA OF SPERMATIC CORD
dominant_finding: homogeneous high SI on T1WI (DDx: hematoma, proteinaceous cyst)

india-ink = black boundary artifact and signal suppression on out-of-phase imaging

US: NO internal flow on color Doppler
